title: micromeria inodora
intro: Micromeria inodora, also known as Thyme-leaved savory or Balsam savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Micromeria inodora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and promote overall well-being.
